productName: mama J's - Bubble Hash Preroll Packs - Sherbacio - 0.5gx2
description: A hybrid infused joint built on Sherbacio and elevated with potent extract, blended in for an even burn and a noticeably bigger hit than flower alone. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — with notes of nutty, sweet, and flowery, with a smooth, well-rounded vibe. A little goes a long way.
